doors.browse_use: public evidence, permit/title/source audits, due-diligence packet patterns
doors.input_contract_hint: public records, source links, addresses, entity names, evidence files
doors.output_artifact_hint: evidence packet, due-diligence brief, caveated report
doors.human_review_boundary: optional unless output affects a person or external system
doors.safety_boundary: keep as reference pattern until copied into an ECC contract
